purpose: Close four reviewed exchange candidates after promotion through D-1000 BX24.

entries.notes: BX24 promotes InkSwap after current first-party application review and independent Ink-chain TVL verification. It remains distinct from InkySwap.
BX24 promotes SuiDex after current first-party V2, V3, routing, pool, and farming review plus independent Sui TVL verification.
BX24 promotes Skate AMM after current first-party unified-liquidity documentation and independent multi-chain TVL, fee, and DEX-volume verification.
BX24 promotes Crystal Exchange as limited after current first-party Monad CLOB application and documentation review. Zero recent independent fee windows prevent active classification.
